products.title: Absolute Aphrodisiac
products.body_html: A carnal, mysterious vanilla. Absolute Aphrodisiac is a fragrance that lingers in the air and the memory. A soft, warm, and carnal vanilla scent amplified by the subtle mystery of white musk and amber.

products.title: Atomic Rose
products.body_html: Hedonic rose. Atomic Rose is a fragrance that creates a luminous, explosive rose trail. A complex harmony of Italian Bergamot, Bulgarian Rose, and Turkish Rose, rounded by Egyptian Jasmine and Vanilla.

products.title: Blue Talisman EDP
products.body_html: A crystalline talisman. Blue Talisman is an explosive, addictive fragrance. Notes of Bergamot and Ginger meet the woody depth of Akigalawood and Musk, creating a modern masterpiece of discovery.

products.title: Adonis Awakens
products.body_html: A romantic floral. Adonis Awakens captures the essence of the Greek god of beauty. A sweet, rosy fragrance with notes of Italian Bergamot, Rose Essence, and Vanilla.

products.title: Babycat
products.body_html: The wild side of vanilla. Babycat is a suede-like vanilla that purrs on the skin. A sophisticated blend of pink pepper, incense, and rich bourbon vanilla.

products.title: 6 Place Saint Sulpice
products.body_html: An architectural amber. Inspired by the YSL boutique, this fragrance is a sophisticated blend of labdanum and smoky woods, creating a masculine, sweet, and powerful presence.

products.title: Another 13
products.body_html: The unconventional clean. Another 13 is an addictive, musk-heavy scent that smells different on everyone. A blend of ambroxan, jasmine, and moss.

products.title: Afternoon Swim
products.body_html: Sun-soaked aquatics and warm skin. Afternoon Swim is a Replica fragrance that captures the essence of a golden afternoon by the pool — a blend of coconut, solar woods, and a subtle white musk.

products.title: Angel's Share On the Rocks
products.body_html: A whisky-soaked seduction. Angel's Share On the Rocks is the chilled, smoky evolution of the iconic Angel's Share. Cognac, oakwood, and cinnamon over a bed of tonka bean and sandalwood.

products.title: Angélique Noire
products.body_html: Dark angelica from the L'Art & La Matière collection. Angélique Noire marries the crisp, green freshness of angelica root with a deep, smoky tonka bean accord — a paradox of light and shadow.

products.title: Ani
products.body_html: A powdery floral odyssey. Ani is a modern oriental inspired by the ancient Anatolian city. Rose, iris, and sandalwood form a warm, powdery harmony that feels timeless and deeply personal.

products.title: Aventus Cologne
products.body_html: The fresh evolution of a legend. Aventus Cologne reinvents the iconic Aventus with a lighter, more aquatic character — pineapple and bergamot over a vetiver-woody base. Effortlessly confident.

products.title: Bal d'Afrique Absolu
products.body_html: The night in full bloom. Bal d'Afrique Absolu is an amplified, richer take on the beloved original — African marigold, bergamot, and violet leaf deepened with oud and musk for an unforgettable presence.

products.title: Bohemian Lime
products.body_html: A lime-soaked reverie. Bohemian Lime is a bright, zesty citrus fragrance with a warm, woody heart. Italian lime, geranium, and vetiver make this the perfect year-round companion.

products.title: Cabán
products.body_html: Quietly powerful. Cabán is an Hermessence creation — a woody, tobacco-infused scent with notes of leather, amber, and a touch of sweet vanilla. Reserved for those who know.

products.title: California Dream
products.body_html: The golden state, bottled. California Dream is a Replica scent that captures the warm, hazy bliss of a Pacific sunset — bergamot, ylang ylang, and cedarwood over a musk-drenched base.

products.title: Castley
products.body_html: Crisp masculinity, perfectly balanced. Castley opens with bergamot and black pepper, then settles into a warm heart of violet and sandalwood. A fragrance for those who command a room quietly.

products.title: City of Stars
products.body_html: A nocturnal amber. City of Stars is an ode to ambition under the night sky — a warm, golden fragrance of honey, sandalwood, and smoked papyrus that smolders on the skin for hours.

products.title: Contralto
products.body_html: The deep note. Contralto is a raw, animalic fragrance from Alessandro Gualtieri — incense, benzoin, and a provocative labdanum base that speaks to the primal and the sacred simultaneously.

products.title: Decision
products.body_html: Fiction in a bottle. Decision is a literary fragrance — beeswax, amber, and a whisper of smoke that reads like the last page of a great novel. Bold enough to finish the chapter.

products.title: French Defense
products.body_html: The cerebral opening move. French Defense is a precise, woody fragrance — vetiver, tobacco, and leather playing a long game on the skin. Deliberate, calculated, and entirely distinctive.

products.title: Frenchy Lavande
products.body_html: Lavender, elevated. Frenchy Lavande takes the most classic of French aromatic ingredients and transforms it — pairing Provençal lavender with smoky vetiver and a rich amber base that defies expectation.

products.title: Gentle Fluidity Silver
products.body_html: The fluid boundary between masculine and feminine. Gentle Fluidity Silver opens on juniper berry and nutmeg, with a heart of musks and ambers — a fragrance without borders, only beauty.

products.title: Herbes Troublantes
products.body_html: Wildness captured. Herbes Troublantes is an aromatic, slightly medicinal green fragrance — a walk through an overgrown field at dusk, with notes of sage, vetiver, and a damp earthiness.

products.title: Imagination
products.body_html: A voyage of the senses. Imagination by Louis Vuitton is a crisp, refreshing fragrance that captures the spirit of travel — cedar, petitgrain, and grapefruit in perfect, effortless balance.

products.title: Ingenious Ginger
products.body_html: A spice that surprises. Ingenious Ginger is a bright, exhilarating fragrance — raw ginger root, bergamot, and a warm musks base create an unexpected freshness that lasts long into the evening.

products.title: Layton
products.body_html: The signature of distinction. Layton is Parfums de Marly's most iconic fragrance — a warm, apple-tinged bergamot opening over a heart of geranium and lavender, resting on vanilla and sandalwood. Universally beloved.

products.title: L'Immensite
products.body_html: The immensity of the sea. L'Immensite opens with bergamot and ginger, evolves through cardamom and coriander, and dries to a driftwood and ambergris base that evokes endless blue horizons.

products.title: Malibu Party in the Bay
products.body_html: Sunset on the Pacific. Malibu Party in the Bay is a bright, fruity-floral celebration — sea salt, peach, and jasmine wrapped in warm musks. Summer in a bottle. Never a bad time to wear it.

products.title: Matcha 26
products.body_html: The meditative green. Matcha 26 captures the ritual of a quiet morning tea — a cool, slightly bitter green tea accord softened by cedarwood and white musk. Mindful, unhurried, and quietly radical.

products.title: Météore
products.body_html: The freshness of the cosmos. Météore is a crisp, bright fragrance — white tea, bergamot, and citrus notes fall like a meteor shower, leaving a trail of white musks and light wood on the skin.

products.title: Mojave Ghost Absolu
products.body_html: The desert, intensified. Mojave Ghost Absolu deepens the iconic original — magnolia, ambrette, and cedarwood amplified with a lush, powdery density. Silence made tangible on the skin.

products.title: Musc Outreblanc
products.body_html: White beyond white. Musc Outreblanc is an extreme musk — a study in purity and skin-scent sensuality. Iris, ambrette, and a layered synthetic musk accord that becomes you.

products.title: Neptune's Trident
products.body_html: Rule the deep. Neptune's Trident is a bold marine-woody fragrance — sea spray, driftwood, and black pepper form an opening salvo, with amber and musks providing a powerful, lasting trail.

products.title: Néroli Outrenoir
products.body_html: White flowers at midnight. Néroli Outrenoir from Guerlain's L'Art & La Matière collection pairs the luminous brightness of neroli with deep oud and woods — a fragrance that blooms in darkness.

products.title: Noir 29
products.body_html: Smoky, woody, provocative. Noir 29 is a bold statement fragrance — black tea, labdanum, and woods create a dark, resinous scent with real staying power. For those who leave an impression.

products.title: Orage
products.body_html: After the storm. Orage is a Replica fragrance that bottles the charged, petrichor-laced air just after a summer downpour — vetiver, neroli, and rain on warm pavement. Evocative and true.

products.title: Outlands
products.body_html: Wide skies and open plains. Outlands is a sweeping, atmospheric fragrance — sage, juniper, and raw leather conjure the American West in all its vastness. An invitation to get lost.

products.title: Pacific Chill
products.body_html: West Coast ease. Pacific Chill is a Replica that captures the effortless cool of a California afternoon — sea salt, cucumber water, and a soft white cedar base. Laid-back luxury.

products.title: Pacific Rock Moss
products.body_html: Coastal mineral depth. Pacific Rock Moss is a rugged, earthy fragrance — rock moss, bergamot, and styrax create a rich, green-woody composition that feels like standing at the ocean's edge at dawn.

products.title: Percival
products.body_html: Knightly freshness. Percival is a crisp, clean signature — bergamot, violet, and a heart of lavender and rosemary over a sandalwood and musk base. Timeless without being predictable.

products.title: Sedley
products.body_html: English countryside in a bottle. Sedley is a fresh, aromatic fragrance — green peppercorn, lavender, and spearmint rest on a bed of sandalwood and cedarwood. Clean, distinguished, memorable.

products.title: Spiritueuse Double Vanille
products.body_html: Vanilla squared. Spiritueuse Double Vanille from Guerlain's L'Art & La Matière is a luscious, rum-laced vanilla — Bourbon vanilla, vanilla absolute, and a warm resin base. The definitive vanilla fragrance.

products.title: Starlight
products.body_html: Above the clouds. Starlight is a delicate, powdery floral — iris, white musk, and a luminous aldehydic accord that feels as though it were designed under open skies at midnight. Refined and unforgettable.

products.title: Symphony
products.body_html: Harmonious complexity. Symphony is a rich floral-woody fragrance — bergamot and pink pepper open to a heart of jasmine and rose, supported by a base of sandalwood, vetiver, and musk. A complete composition.

products.title: Torino 21
products.body_html: The hidden city exclusive. Torino 21 is a complex leather-floral fragrance created for Turin — rose, blackcurrant, and a smoky leather accord that feels like a perfectly cut Italian suit. Exclusive by design.

products.title: Tuxedo
products.body_html: Dressed to the nines. Tuxedo is a rich, warm amber-woody fragrance — iris root, tonka bean, and vanilla are wrapped in a labdanum and cedarwood base. Effortlessly elegant, undeniably memorable.

products.title: Vibrato
products.body_html: The resonant note. Vibrato is a bold, woody-aromatic fragrance — clary sage, cedarwood, and a deep musks accord that vibrates on the skin long after the top notes fade. For those who are felt before they're seen.

products.title: Virgin Island Water
products.body_html: Paradise found. Virgin Island Water is Creed's summer masterpiece — a blend of coconut, rum, lime, and bergamot that captures the freedom of a Caribbean day in full sail. Sun-drenched, joyful, unforgettable.
